artifact.content_preview:
From: security.audit@tbs-sct.gc.ca
To: ngis-pm@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Cc: itsec-director@ssc-spc.gc.ca; ciso@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Subject: URGENT: ITSG-33 Compliance Gap — NGIS Phase 3 Network Migration
Date: Thu, 5 Mar 2026 08:47:15 -0500

Project Management Team,

During the scheduled ITSG-33 security compliance review for NGIS Phase 3
(review conducted February 28–March 4, 2026), our audit team identified
a Category 2 finding that must be addressed before the migration proceeds.

FINDING SUMMARY:
Control: IA

metadata.subject: URGENT: ITSG-33 Compliance Gap — NGIS Phase 3 Network Migration

risks.description: March 18 migration window at risk — compliance gap unresolved

evidence_refs.excerpt: Until this finding is resolved, the March 18 migration window should be considered at risk.

risks.description: PBMM cloud hosting authorization may be placed on hold — compliance failure

evidence_refs.excerpt: SSC's PBMM cloud hosting authorization may be placed on hold

risks.description: SA&A package missing PAW architecture documentation — single-sourced risk

evidence_refs.excerpt: SA&A package is missing the Privileged Access Workstation (PAW) architecture documentation

risks.description: Updated SA&A documentation due March 12, 2026 — deadline at risk

evidence_refs.excerpt: provide the updated SA&A documentation addressing Control IA-5 to this office no later than March 12, 2026

risks.description: No backup vendor identified for PAW architecture review — single-sourced risk

evidence_refs.excerpt: meeting between the SSC CISO office and the NGIS project team must be scheduled
